name: Athol YMCA
description: Athol YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Athol, MA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Boroughs Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Boroughs Family YMCA in Westborough, MA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water. Reservations are available.

name: Boylston Hillside Gym Attached to Town Hall on 2nd floor
description:
2 playable courts and 1 drill court, present registration is through Playtimescheduler.  And clinics or court rentals is through Boylston Park and Rec at www.boylstonma.myrec.com

Play punch cards can purchased for $3/session resident (Boylston, West Boylston, Berlin), $6 non resident
hours: Monday - Thursday: 8:00 am - 2:00 pm Contact Us Boylston Parks and Recreation 221 Main Street Boylston, MA 01505 Email: boylstonparks@boylston-ma.gov Phone: 508-869-6009 Connect with Us Hours Of Operation Office Hours: Monday - Thursday 8:00 am - 2:00 pm Hours may vary due to recreation programming. Our Sponsors Previous Next Sponsor our site or a program! Give us a call © 2026 Boylston Parks and Recreation Terms ○ Privacy ○ Help ○ How To Provided by MyRec.com Recreation Software

name: Grafton Municipal Center
description: The photo showing is Grafton High School. Those courts are tennis. There are no pickleball lines. Not PB friendly at the High School. The Municipal Center is next to the High School (not shown). Grafton residents only. Sign up through Grafton Recreation.

The courts are private.
